title: 5 injured as KSRTC low-floor bus crashes into roadside shop in Thrissur
summary: A KSRTC bus crashed into a shop in Thrissur after the driver swerved to avoid an oncoming vehicle, trapping the driver and injuring five others.

title: Idukki man who absconded after bail convicted 19 years later for neighbour's murder
summary: A man received a life sentence and a ₹1 lakh fine for murdering his neighbour, who planned to report his drunken behaviour. The accused, who absconded for nearly two decades, was finally apprehended.

title: Heavy rain flattens house in Kanhangad; three escape moments before collapse
summary: A family of three narrowly escaped a house collapse caused by monsoon rains in Kanhangad, fleeing just moments before their home became uninhabitable.

title: 3 children, priest bitten by stray dog in Idukki; shifted to Kottayam Medical College amid anti-rabies vaccine shortage
summary: Four people, including three children and a priest, were bitten by a stray dog in Kumily; they were sent to hospital as vaccines were unavailable locally.

title: Illegal car racing on Kasaragod school ground 'to support Operation Toofan'; SI assaulted, six cars seized
summary: Police impounded six cars and arrested youths for dangerous car racing at a school playground, which endangered students and parents, and involved assaulting an officer.

title: Drug smuggling kingpin arrested for trafficking cannabis to Gulf via fake job offers
summary: Idukki Crime Branch arrested alleged gang kingpin K P Rasheed for smuggling cannabis to the Gulf disguised as chips, luring unsuspecting youths with fake jobs.

title: Two juveniles held for assaulting four-year-old boy in Idukki

title: Kochi Corporation plans to end subsidised biomedical waste collection; new model likely from August
summary: Kochi Corporation will end subsidised household biomedical waste collection from August, shifting to a non-subsidised, multi-agency system due to irregular collections and rising costs.

title: 21-year-old killed as tree branch falls on scooter in Idukki
